name: Selena + Chef: Home for the Holidays
original_name: Selena + Chef: Home for the Holidays
overview: Selena Gomez is at the top of her game as a musical artist, actor, businesswoman, and philanthropist, but she calls in the experts to help amp up her kitchen skills for the holidays. This year she has invited all-star chefs Eric Adjepong, Alex Guarnaschelli, Michael Symon, and Claudette Zepeda to bring their favorite dishes and culinary wisdom to her home kitchen so they can cook up perfect holiday meals to share with friends and family.

trailers.title: Selena Gomez's New Year's Eve Tradition | Selena + Chef: Home for the Holidays | Max
